[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000100 1
1 011110000 4
2 111101000 5
3 111110010 6
4 100111101 6
5 111111111 a
6 010101010 4
7 111110111 8
